scripts.bundle:harmony: rm -rf harmony-bundle && npx react-native bundle --platform android --dev false --entry-file index.harmony.ts --bundle-output harmony-bundle/bundle.harmony.js --assets-dest harmony-bundle/assets
scripts.bundle:harmony:rnoh: rm -rf harmony-bundle && npx react-native bundle --platform harmony --dev false --entry-file index.harmony.ts --bundle-output harmony-bundle/bundle.harmony.js --assets-dest harmony-bundle/assets
